title: crepis biennis subsp. maritima
intro: Crepis biennis subsp. maritima, also known as the sea hawk's beard or creeping hawk's beard, is a subspecies of the perennial herb Crepis biennis, characterized by its hairy stems and leaves. The medicinal properties of Crepis biennis subsp. maritima include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections. Crepis biennis subsp. maritima can be prepared into various herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in traditional medicine and herbal remedies.
